claim: The Eiffel Tower is located in Berlin, Germany.
context_chunks: The Eiffel Tower is a wrought-iron lattice tower on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France. It was constructed from 1887 to 1889.

claim: The Pacific Ocean is smaller than Lake Ontario.
context_chunks: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of Earth's oceanic divisions.
Lake Ontario is one of the five Great Lakes of North America and is much smaller than any of the world's oceans.

claim: Python is a web browser that was first released in 2015.
context_chunks: Python is a high-level, general-purpose programming language. Its design philosophy emphasizes code readability.
The first version of Python was released in 1991 by Guido van Rossum.

claim: Mount Everest is a desert island in the Pacific Ocean.
context_chunks: Mount Everest is Earth's highest mountain above sea level, located in the Himalayas on the border between Nepal and the Tibet Autonomous Region of China.

claim: The human body has three hearts and green blood.
context_chunks: In humans, the heart is a muscular organ responsible for pumping blood through the circulatory system.
Humans typically have a single heart and red blood due to the presence of hemoglobin.

claim: The iPhone was first released in 1980.
context_chunks: Apple Inc. introduced the first iPhone on January 9, 2007, and released it later that year.
In the 1980s, Apple focused on personal computers such as the Apple II and Macintosh.

claim: Water boils at 50 degrees Celsius at sea level.
context_chunks: At standard atmospheric pressure (sea level), pure water boils at 100 degrees Celsius (212 degrees Fahrenheit).

claim: The Eiffel Tower was completed in 1889 and is painted bright blue.
context_chunks: The Eiffel Tower was completed in 1889 for the 1889 World's Fair in Paris.
The tower is repainted every seven years using several shades of brown known as "Eiffel Tower brown."

claim: Python is used for data science and was created by Guido van Rossum in the 1990s.
context_chunks: Python is popular in data science, web development, automation, and many other domains.
Python was created by Guido van Rossum and first released in 1991.

claim: The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean and is entirely in the Northern Hemisphere.
context_chunks: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of Earth's oceanic divisions.
It extends from the Arctic Ocean in the north to the Southern Ocean in the south, and from Asia and Australia in the west to the Americas in the east.

claim: New York City is in the United States and has exactly 12 million residents.
context_chunks: New York City is the most populous city in the United States, located in the state of New York.
Its population is in the millions, but the exact number fluctuates over time.

claim: FastAPI is a web framework for building APIs in Python and is part of the standard library.
context_chunks: FastAPI is a modern, fast web framework for building APIs with Python based on standard type hints.
It is an external library that can be installed from PyPI and is not part of the Python standard library.

claim: PyTorch is an open-source deep learning framework and was originally developed at Google.
context_chunks: PyTorch is an open-source machine learning framework based on the Torch library.
It was primarily developed by Facebook's AI Research lab (FAIR).

claim: The Eiffel Tower was completed in 1889 in Paris, France.
context_chunks: The Eiffel Tower is a wrought-iron lattice tower on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France.
Construction of the tower was completed in 1889 for the Exposition Universelle.

claim: Python is a high-level programming language widely used in data science.
context_chunks: Python is a high-level, general-purpose programming language.
It has become one of the dominant languages in data science, machine learning, and scientific computing.

claim: FastAPI is a modern, fast web framework for building APIs with Python.
context_chunks: FastAPI is a modern, fast (high-performance) web framework for building APIs with Python based on standard type hints.

claim: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of Earth's oceans.
context_chunks: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of Earth's oceanic divisions, covering more than 30% of the Earth's surface.

claim: Mount Everest is the highest mountain above sea level on Earth.
context_chunks: Mount Everest is Earth's highest mountain above sea level, located in the Himalayas on the border between Nepal and the Tibet Autonomous Region of China.

claim: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at standard atmospheric pressure.
context_chunks: At standard atmospheric pressure (sea level), pure water boils at 100 degrees Celsius (212 degrees Fahrenheit).

claim: PyTorch is an open-source deep learning framework based on the Torch library.
context_chunks: PyTorch is an open-source machine learning framework based on the Torch library.
It is widely used for deep learning research and production.
